rankings.reason: Best alignment with the 2050 futuristic theme, incorporating biometrics, robotics, and immersive dome technology.
Good focus on passenger experience and amenities, though it lacks the high-tech, futuristic innovation requested.
Too abstract and vague; it fails to describe any actual airport infrastructure or technological features.
Describes current, outdated airport procedures rather than a futuristic, innovative experience for the year 2050.
